businessQuestion: Which promotions delivered the highest demand lift percentage?
sqlAnswer:
SELECT
    DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME,
    DPROM.PROMOTION_TYPE,
    AVG(FPP.DEMAND_LIFT_PCT) AS AVG_DEMAND_LIFT,
    SUM(FPP.PROMO_SALES_AMT) AS PROMO_SALES
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_PROMOTION_PERFORMANCE FPP
JOIN CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.DIM_PROMOTION DPROM
ON FPP.PROMOTION_KEY = DPROM.PROMOTION_KEY
GROUP BY
    DPROM.PROMOTION_NAME,
    DPROM.PROMOTION_TYPE
ORDER BY AVG_DEMAND_LIFT DESC;
businessContext: Marketing wants to identify the promotions that generated the strongest increase in customer demand.
